**Nitrobenzene Fukui Reactivity Indices** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz`, not optimized. SCF converged.

The Fukui indices for nitrobenzene are as follows:

| Atom | Index (0-based) | f+ (electrophilic) | f- (nucleophilic) | f0 (radical) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| O | 0 | 0.47317 | 0.09702 | 0.28509 |
| O | 1 | 0.47344 | 0.09677 | 0.28511 |
| N | 2 | -0.45670 | 0.01724 | -0.21973 |
| C | 3 | 0.49642 | -0.01429 | 0.24106 |
| C | 4 | 0.11563 | 0.10729 | 0.11146 |
| C | 5 | 0.11588 | 0.10724 | 0.11156 |
| C | 6 | 0.17412 | 0.09492 | 0.13452 |
| C | 7 | 0.17423 | 0.09489 | 0.13456 |
| C | 8 | 0.28914 | 0.00831 | 0.14872 |
| H | 9 | -0.23169 | 0.07521 | -0.07824 |
| H | 10 | -0.23182 | 0.07520 | -0.07831 |
| H | 11 | -0.13372 | 0.08388 | -0.02492 |
| H | 12 | -0.13379 | 0.08388 | -0.02496 |
| H | 13 | -0.12431 | 0.07243 | -0.02594 |

The most electrophilic site (highest f+) is C (atom index 3) with an f+ value of 0.49642.
The most nucleophilic site (highest f-) is C (atom index 4) with an f- value of 0.10729.

The plot showing the Fukui functions can be found at: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260706-220749_nitrobenzene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.

No warnings reported.
